arguments.name: equip_chestplate
arguments.description: Equip leather chestplate for torso protection

arguments.name: eat_bread_safe
arguments.description: Eat bread to restore health when in safe location (inside box or on pillar)

arguments.name: build_pillar_3
arguments.description: Build a 3-block high pillar to escape melee range when under attack

arguments.name: attack_hostile_by_id
arguments.description: Attack a specific hostile mob entity ID with current weapon

arguments.name: retreat_50_blocks
arguments.description: Move 50 blocks away from nearest hostile threat immediately

arguments.name: shelter_with_planks
arguments.description: Build a full shelter box around current position using oak planks

arguments.name: shoot_arrow_at_hostile
arguments.description: Shoot arrow at hostile entity if beyond melee range (6+ blocks)
